column1: Instructions: Write your answers in column D. Use the Employee_Sales_Data sheet as your dataset.

Create a new column: If an employee's Bonus > 0, write 'Bonus Received', else write 'No Bonus'.
Create a column: If Sales Amount > Sales Target, write 'Target Achieved', else 'Target Missed'.

Create a column: If Status = 'Active', write 'Current Employee', else write 'Ex-Employee'.
Create a column: If Age > 40, write 'Veteran', else write 'Young Talent'.
Create a Salary Grade column: <50000='Grade C', 50000–79999='Grade B', >=80000='Grade A'.
Create a Performance Score: 'Excellent'=5, 'Good'=4, 'Average'=3, 'Below Avg'=2.
Create an Experience Level: <3 yrs='Fresher', 3–7='Mid Level', >7='Senior'.
Create a Sales Achievement Band: Achieved & Excellent='Star', Achieved & others='Achiever', Missed='Needs Improvement'.
